title: adina spathellifera
intro: Adina spathellifera, also known as the spotted Adina, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antibacterial and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Adina spathellifera include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In herbal medicine, Adina spathellifera is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment to treat external wounds and skin issues.
